utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5. Check full specification per item: 
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan includes both physical and mental sections with details and individual costs, plus total—fully specified. 
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided plan name, details, and cost—fully specified. 
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Provided plan, details, and cost—fully specified. 
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Provided service name, details, and cost—fully specified. 
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided a single total budget (590). It is a total monthly number but lacks explicit monthly/annual breakdown; however, it does present a complete total. Given the instruction, 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown' suggests both monthly and annual. Only monthly is explicit (by implication). This may be considered incomplete. Therefore, 4 fully specified items out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items: PrimeCare Premium Plan (health physical and mental), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), and Insurance Concierge (an additional service). Matching these to the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan appears under both physical and mental health with ratings 10 each. EliteHome Premium Coverage appears under home content with a rating of 10. PrimeTravel Premium Plan appears under travel insurance with a rating of 10. 'Insurance Concierge' does not appear in the ground-truth ratings list, so it cannot be mapped.
